name: Huntington Coach Corp
carrier_operation: Interstate; Authorized For Hire, Private Property, Private Passenger (Business), School Bus
fmcsa_address: 1359 New York Avenue, Huntington Station, NY 11746
inc_date: 1927 (operational founding per company history; formal NY DOS records also show a refiled domestic corporation entity DOS ID 4716638 filed 02/26/2015 — likely a restructuring/re-domestication tied to ownership changes)
officers: Owned by Beacon Mobility (acquired Feb 2023); historically Clifford family (Kevin Clifford former president); DBA Roy K Davis Bus; mailing care of Beacon Mobility HQ, 3700 Embassy Parkway Ste 500, Akron, OH 44333
registry_source: NY Department of State Division of Corporations (per bizapedia-sourced DOS ID 4716638); Huntington Coach corporate history page
notes: Address, name, and city match exactly. Rated Satisfactory 11/28/1990 (review 10/10/1990). Fleet of ~895 power units / 307 drivers confirms one of the largest LI student-transport operators. Operationally founded 1927 by the Dempsey family; ownership chain: Dempsey -> Ernest Schenk (1950) -> James & Dorothy Clifford (1955) -> Kevin Clifford (1965+) -> Beacon Mobility (Feb 2023). Already owned by Beacon Mobility, so NOT an independent tuck-in target.

name: Handi Van Inc
carrier_operation: Intrastate paratransit (historical) — no confident FMCSA carrier match
officers: Diana L. Azor (Registered Agent, 1333 SW 175 Way, Pembroke Pines, FL 33029); Masi Neff (Vice President); Gary L. Neff (Secretary), both at 8418 Mallards Way, Naples, FL 34114
entity_status: Inactive – Administratively Dissolved for failure to file annual report, effective 09/26/2014
registry_source: Florida Division of Corporations (Sunbiz) – Document Number F87491, FEI/EIN 59-2202673
notes: Sunbiz record at 55 NW 119 St N Miami FL 33168 exactly matches the input address. Mailing PO Box 530963, Miami Shores, FL 33153. Entity is administratively dissolved since 2014 — operationally defunct or unwound. No FMCSA SAFER record matches the Miami Handi Van Inc; the only similar carrier (HANDI-VAN TRANSPORT INC, USDOT 2448133) is a Sarasota-area entity, not this Miami corp. Handi Van Inc litigated against Broward County over paratransit bids (FindLaw case). Likely operated as a county-contracted paratransit van service that never carried an FMCSA USDOT because it was intrastate non-CMV-classified.

name: Carrier Coach Inc
fmcsa_status: Active (FMCSA record); Not Authorized for-hire interstate operating authority
inc_date: unknown (founded c.1976 per news reporting ~40+ years of operation prior to 2016 closure)
officers: unknown — no current public NY DOS record visible via search; historical management not surfaced
entity_status: unknown — likely dissolved or inactive in NY DOS following the 2016 wind-down, but FMCSA USDOT 967091 record remained marked Active
registry_source: NY Department of State Division of Corporations (search inconclusive)
notes: FMCSA address (3999 Lake Shore Rd, Blasdell, NY) matches the input '3999 Lake Shore Rd #1, Buffalo, NY 14219' (Blasdell shares the 14219 ZIP with the Buffalo postal area). Power units 158 and drivers 158 are equal — typical of school-bus carriers (one driver per bus). WIVB News reported in July 2016 that Carrier Coach was closing after 40+ years with fleet headed to auction in Hamburg, NY. Yelp listing shows 'Updated March 2026' which suggests a directory listing still exists but may not reflect active operations. The FMCSA Active flag may simply be due to USDOT record carryover. Treat as a defunct or wind-down operator for tuck-in purposes; confirm field status directly.

name: Royal Coach Lines
carrier_operation: Interstate; For-Hire Passenger Service and School Bus Operations
inc_date: 1950 (operational founding by John Sinistol of Harrison, NY; relocated to Yonkers and acquired by Beniamino DiPaolo in 1957)
officers: DiPaolo family (multi-generational owners until 2023); now part of Beacon Mobility following Sept 2023 acquisition (control granted by FMCSA via Federal Register filing June 14, 2023; closed Sept 1, 2023)
entity_status: Active NY domestic business corporation (OpenCorporates record at us_ny/2491082)
registry_source: NY Department of State Division of Corporations (OpenCorporates NY company 2491082); EIN 13-2609998
notes: FMCSA name/USDOT 5920 (very low number, consistent with long-tenured carrier dating to 1950). Address in FMCSA snapshot is the Yonkers HQ (1010 Nepperhan Ave); the input address '2260 Saw Mill River Rd, Elmsford, NY' is the secondary Elmsford depot listed on royalcoachlines.com/contact. Carrier rated Satisfactory 02/19/2002 (last review 07/30/2010). Acquired by Beacon Mobility (Van Pool Transportation LLC) effective Sept 1, 2023 — NOT an independent tuck-in target.

name: F & S Transportation
carrier_operation: Interstate; School Bus with Authorized For-Hire Authority; Passengers
inc_date: 1976 (family-owned founding per company materials; PA Department of State entity-number lookup not confidently surfaced via search)
entity_status: Active (PA Department of State business entity)
registry_source: PA Department of State business entity search (https://file.dos.pa.gov/search/business) — specific entity number not retrievable via search snippets
notes: Address (37 S Main St, Manchester, PA 17345) and name match exactly. Family-owned since 1976. Operates student transportation across multiple school districts in York and Adams counties with 100+ part-time drivers. Also offers charters/tours and 7-/15-passenger van rentals. 136 power units vs 88 drivers consistent with part-time driver model. Rated Satisfactory 01/14/2016. Independent operator — viable tuck-in candidate.
